title: Department Manager Vacancy at Starbucks India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Starbucks India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Starbucks India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Department Manager to join our dynamic team in Jaipur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Starbucks India:
Starbucks India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Starbucks India!
